description: From the manufacturer The 85% larger close-edge plates allow you to take large sections with speed, get closer to the roots, and achieve up to 3x straighter hair in one-stroke. Ideal for long, thick & curly hair GHD CHRONOS MAX SEEING IS BELIEVING... ghd Chronos Max gives you high-definition results that last 24 hours: Up to 90% more shine 2.5x less frizz in one stroke No extreme heat damage Previous page NO HEAT DAMAGE HD motion-responsive technology is designed to maintain the optimum styling temperature of 185°C HD RESULTS High-definition results: up to 90% more shine 2.5x less frizz in one stroke no extreme heat damage 85% LARGER PLATES Provides easy glide & up to 90% more shine while the 24% thinner edges allow for root-to-tip styling Next page Introducing the ghd Chronos Max, our professional HD motion-responsive wide plate styler 1 GLASS HAIR 2 NO HEAT DAMAGE 3 HD RESULTS 4 85% LARGER PLATES 5 24 HR HD RESULTS ACHIEVE GLASS HAIR LOOK WITH GHD CHRONOS MAX The video showcases the product in use.
